pageTitle: Response submitted. You must pay your counterclaim fee
responseSubmittedCounterClaimFeePaymentN: We’ve sent you a confirmation email.
Pay your counterclaim fee. If you do not, your counterclaim will not be considered.
A hearing date will be scheduled. You’ll get a notification telling you when this has happened. At the hearing, a judge will listen to both sides and make a decision. You should come to the hearing.

Some people need support to use HMCTS services, like step-free access to a court for a hearing. If you need support and have not already asked for it in your response, contact us. Use the ‘Contact us for help’ link on this page.
We’d like to hear your thoughts
Complete this short survey to help us improve this service (opens in new tab) (usually takes 5 minutes).
